title: Langlands Universality on Remaining Problems

analysis.object: T532: Langlands Universality on Remaining Problems depth analysis

hodge_luc30.description: Hodge = LUC-30; algebraic-Hodge bijection is 30th Langlands instance
hodge_luc30.reason: Confirmed: Hodge is two-level {0,2} duality via EML-inf motive

bsd_luc34.description: BSD rank 2+ = LUC-34; analytic-algebraic rank duality
bsd_luc34.reason: BSD is two-level {2,3} duality; LUC-34 confirmed

ym_luc36.description: Yang-Mills = LUC-36; lattice-continuum duality for mass gap
ym_luc36.reason: YM is two-level {2,3} duality; LUC-36 confirmed

ns_luc_open.description: NS has no clean Langlands instance; EML-inf barrier may preclude LUC
ns_luc_open.reason: NS inaccessibility may mean no LUC instance exists; permanently EML-inf

analysis.theorem: T532: Langlands Universality on Remaining Problems (S811).
